Kısa Özgeçmiş

International Advisory Committee Member, Oxygen Club of California (1999- ); FEBS Advanced Course Committee Member (2003-2006); FEBS Fellowships Committee Member (2021-2024), Secretary General Society for Free Radical Research-Europe (SFRR-E), Member of the Council (2003-2009) ve President of SFRR-E (2013-2014) gibi uluslararası organizasyonlara önemli görevlerde bulunmuştur.

The Oxygen Club of California Award “Life Time Honorary Member” (2006) “In recognition of outstanding research contributions on the role of vitamin E in atherosclerosis and to fostering the field of free radical biology” ve The Society for Free Radical Research-Europe Lifetime Achievement Award (2019) “In recognition of Lifetime Extraordinary Scientific Achievements in the Field of Free Radical Research” gibi uluslararası ödüllere layik görülmüştür.
